titleStmt.title: SII 10.536: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 536. (A.R. No. 329 of 1905.) ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING IN THE MAل¹†ل¸ŒAPA IN FRONT OF THE RUINED إڑIVA TEMPLE CALLED MOBBUDؤ’VALAM NEAR UPPARAPALLI, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT. Undated.

summary.p: States that Pratؤپpa-Rudradؤ“va appointed his son Juل¹­ل¹­aya's servant (leل¹…ka) Gإچل¹…kaya-Reل¸چل¸چi to govern Khaل¹‡ل¸چikإچل¹­a (Gaل¹‡ل¸چikإچل¹­a) and the Mulikinؤپل¹‡ل¸چu country and that, while so governing, the Reل¸چل¸چi gave away the village of Khaل¹‡ل¸چikإچل¹­a (?) rent free to the residents.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
